// 001

About

BRAINWAVE is an Internal hackathon organized by the Department of Computer Science & Engineering and Computer Science & Design at PDA College of Engineering, presented by Blue Chip. Build, innovate, and push boundaries in a 8-hour coding marathon.

Open to all CSE & CSD students
Teams of 3–5 members
8-hour build sprint
Real-world problem statements
Expert judging panel & Mentoring
// 002

Rules

Team size: minimum 3, maximum 5 members
All team members must be from CSE or CSD department
Code must be written during the hackathon — no pre-built projects
Use of open-source libraries and APIs is allowed
Projects must be submitted before the deadline
Judging based on: innovation, execution, impact, presentation
Plagiarism will result in immediate disqualification
Decision of judges is final and binding
// 003
